lineup_source: DR Congo vs Colombia, World Cup group stage, 24 June 2026 (5-3-2)

players.name: Lionel Mpasi
players.note: Born in Meaux, France, to Congolese parents who had migrated to France before his birth.

players.name: Aaron Wan-Bissaka
players.note: Born in Croydon, England; father Ambroise fled DR Congo in 1997, both parents Congolese.

players.name: Chancel Mbemba
players.note: Born in Kinshasa; mother Antoinette was a DR Congo women's national basketball player.

players.name: Axel Tuanzebe
players.note: Born in Bunia, DR Congo; emigrated to England with his Congolese family in 2001 fleeing civil war.

players.name: Steve Kapuadi
players.note: Born in Le Mans, France, to parents of DR Congo origin.

players.name: Arthur Masuaku
players.note: Born in Lille, France, to DR Congolese parents; played for France youth before switching to DR Congo in 2017.

players.name: Ngal'ayel Mukau
players.note: Born in Antwerp, Belgium; holds Congolese and French nationality via his parents, mother Congolese.

players.name: Samuel Moutoussamy
players.note: Born in Paris; mother is Congolese, father is Indo-Guadeloupean (French overseas territory) of Tamil descent.

players.name: Edo Kayembe
players.note: Born in Kananga, DR Congo; moved to Belgium only as a young professional with Anderlecht.

players.name: Cedric Bakambu
players.note: Born in Vitry-sur-Seine, France, to parents from DR Congo's Kongo Central province; dual French-Congolese national.

players.name: Yoane Wissa
players.note: Born in Val-de-Marne, France, to a family from DR Congo's Kongo-Central and Equateur regions.
